name: Arafat Hossain
bio: We studied Computer Science together at university. He now works as a software engineer in Dhaka. We used to code and play FIFA late at night.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: We were classmates in high school. She loves painting and often shares her artwork on social media. We catch up occasionally over phone calls.

name: Rakib Hasan
bio: Met him at the local gym. He keeps me motivated with fitness goals and we often work out together in the mornings.

name: Farhana Rahman
bio: Worked together on a freelance UI/UX project. She is a talented designer and always gives great feedback on my work.

name: Imran Kabir
bio: We met at a startup networking event. He runs a small tech startup and often shares business ideas and opportunities.

name: Sadia Karim
bio: Family friend who loves traveling. We recently planned a trip to Cox’s Bazar and often discuss travel destinations.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: We played football together during school days. He is still very active in local tournaments and always invites me to join.
